name: Kaag en Braassem (Netherlands)
description: A white field bearing the municipal logo and the name 'gemeente Kaag en Braassem'.
history: Flag of the municipality of Kaag en Braassem in the province of South Holland, formed in 2009. The flag is the municipality's logo/wordmark banner rather than a heraldic design.

features.role: the municipal logo and wordmark 'gemeente Kaag en Braassem'
